channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dead cat on pathway, 21st April
item.description:
Dead cat on pathway in front of home with child.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Craydene Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Medical waste dumped again, 21st April
item.description:
Medical Easter extremely dangerous dumped again at belverdere court N1 5SLThis is happening almost daily . Please help investigate and remove in the meantime.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Beauvoir Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 21st April
item.description:
Graffiti

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 43, Rookery Gardens, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Boards, large boxes and a suitcase, 21st April
item.description:
Boards from dismantled furniture were dumped, and then large cardboard boxed that were not picked up with the latest recycling. It's becoming a dumping ground with a suitcase and a tent.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25-31, Brunel Road, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cat heated by the car., 21st April
item.description:
Dead cat

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 127, Star Lane, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 21st April
item.description:
An old fridge has been left on the street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Graham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car been parked on road obstructing bus stop, 21st April
item.description:
This car - which appears to be a registered mini cab - seems to have been abandoned on Bourne Vale for weeks. It is has parked a little way out from the kerb, very close to the bus stop. It is causing an obstruction to passing traffic and particularly to buses and other vehicles when a bus is attempting to pass or stop at the bus stop.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Vale, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing yellow lines, 21st April
item.description:
Double yellow lines have been recently painted on Barbot close to allow access for fire engines as cars parking was preventing access but there are some gaps in the yellow lines causing vehicles to still park and making the road very narrow, in a case of an emergency fire engines will not be able to pass
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barbot Close, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Side of 120 Godstow Road: sacks of rubbish., 21st April
item.description:
Sacks of rubbish are on grass under tree.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eynsham Drive, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 40 Eynsham Drive: wooden planks, etc., 21st April
item.description:
Wooden planks have been placed behind a metal cabinet at side of 40 Eynsham Drive.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eynsham Drive, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paving stones removed and barriers blocking pavement, 21st April
item.description:
This appears to have been reported a number of times - back in November and again recently and still remains unresolved. Paving stones have been removed and not replaced )it looks like tree roots have perhaps pushed up the stones which have then been removed). Barriers are lying on the pavement causing an obstruction and potential hazard to those using the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kechill Gardens, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish in the under pass, 21st April
item.description:
There was a lot of rubbish in the underpass I went through there on Friday 17th April and Sunday 19th April 2026. On Sunday I was approached by a dishevelled man who was begging, he was very unpleasant when I ignored him

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Great Cambridge Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Increasing gang and other graffiti on John Ruskin street, 21st April
item.description:
Increasing gang and other graffiti on John Ruskin street. Do something about it because it’s increasing and ruining the area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): John Ruskin Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned shopping trolley, 21st April
item.description:
Abandoned shopping trolley at junction of Narrow Boat Close and Ridge Close - it is there for a few days and moves around grassy park area..It could be returned to Food Farmhouse shop for reuse.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ridge Close, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Increasing gang tag Graffiti all over the building on warham street, 21st April
item.description:
Gang tag graffiti which is increasing because it hasn’t been removed all over the building on warham street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grimsel Path, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building materials left on the road outside 36 Westbury Rd, 21st April
item.description:
Building materials left outside 36 Westbury Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westbury Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped mattress., 21st April
item.description:
This has been previously reported and marked as solved, but the mattress is still there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking driveway double yellow, 21st April
item.description:
This area is also a passing point. There is now a traffic jam and there is no way for cars to pass each other.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking, 21st April
item.description:
Two cars are being blocked by this car

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-13, Lewisham High Street, Ladywell, Lewisham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside pharmacy, 21st April

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Salusbury Road, London
